Rank 1 in NDA 2024

“I secured All India Rank 1 in NDA 2024. I began my preparation in Class 12 and continued with focused preparation through structured online batches.

The expert faculty guidance, regular mock tests, and strategic mentorship helped me strengthen my Mathematics, English, and GAT concepts. Continuous motivation and doubt-solving sessions played a key role in my success.

I am truly grateful for the support system that helped me stay consistent and confident throughout my journey.”

Raj Kishor
Rank 1 in NDA 2024

AIR 84 – NDA 2024

“The comprehensive study material and well-planned online classes helped me build strong fundamentals in Mathematics and English.

Regular revision sessions, doubt-solving support, and motivational guidance during tough phases kept me consistent. I am thankful for the guidance that helped me secure AIR 84 in NDA 2024.”

Aditya Rajput
All India Rank 84 | NDA 2024

AIR 12 – NDA 2024

“Joining the Defence preparation batch completely transformed my preparation strategy. The structured timetable, regular mock tests, and detailed performance analysis helped me identify my weak areas.

The Mathematics and GAT faculty made complex topics simple and easy to understand. Continuous motivation and doubt-clearing sessions kept me focused throughout the journey. I am proud to have secured AIR 12 in NDA 2024.”

Aarav Singh
All India Rank 12 | NDA 2024
